channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: British Museum reviews and updates Middle East gallery terminology after concerns raised by UK Lawyers for Israel
item.description: The British Museum has confirmed that it is reviewing and updating terminology used in some of its Middle East gallery displays after concerns were raised by UK Lawyers for Israel (UKLFI), a UK-based ...

item.title: Colombian Congresswoman Ángela Vergara Appeals for Help After Son Detained by ICE
item.description: Colombian Congresswoman Ángela Vergara has publicly appealed for help after her son, Rafael Alfonso Vergara, was detained by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). In a video shared on social...

item.title: Overview of The Jmail Encyclopedia and Epstein Email Archive Profiles
item.description: The Jmail Encyclopedia, known as Jikipedia, is a digital repository documenting individuals, places, and events related to the Epstein scandal. Based on AI-generated profiles, it synthesizes informati...

item.title: Ukrainian Artist Creates Elegant Animal Sculptures from Wood and Resin
item.description: Ukrainian artist Yurii Myketka, working under the label WoodWhaleLab, crafts striking animal sculptures using a combination of wood and resin. His creations include birds, whales, and dogs, each desig...

item.title: Essential Safeguards for a Successful Freelance Career
item.description: Freelancing offers independence and flexibility but comes with unique challenges that require careful planning. Transitioning from traditional employment to independent work removes the safety net of ...

item.title: Photographer Captures Meteor Appearing to Enter Mount Merapi During Long-Exposure Shot
item.description: Photographer Gunarto Song captured a striking long-exposure photograph of Mount Merapi, a highly active stratovolcano in Indonesia, showing a meteor streaking across the night sky. While the meteor mo...

item.title: Report Claims Over 50,000 Foreign Nationals Served in Israeli Forces During Gaza War

item.title: Reflections on KillBait’s First Year: AI, Clickbait, and Community Feedback

item.title: Electric Bicycle Co. Files for Chapter 7 Bankruptcy, Citing Tariffs and Financial Pressures

item.description: Delta Sky Club access rules have changed significantly in recent years, largely in response to overcrowding. The article explains that, in all cases, travelers must be flying Delta or a Delta partner ...

item.title: NASA and SpaceX Launch Crew-12 to the ISS Following Early Return of Crew-11

item.title: Senate Democrats Introduce Bill to Prohibit Surveillance and Surge Pricing in Large Grocery Stores

item.title: US Department of Justice Confirms Compilation of Domestic Terrorism List
item.description: On February 15, 2026, U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi acknowledged, for the first time, the existence of a secret list of 'domestic terrorist organizations' during a House of Representatives hearing. ...
